key_metrics_output: Polymer type symbols and abbreviated terms; classification of basic polymers and their special characteristics
abstract: ISO 1043-1:2011/Amd 1:2016 is an international standard that establishes symbols and abbreviated terms for plastics, specifically covering basic polymers and their special characteristics. Amendment 1:2016 introduces a new symbol (ST) for syndiotactic polymers.

key_metrics_output: Basic polymers and their special characteristics
abstract: Plastics — Symbols and abbreviated terms — Part 1: Basic polymers and their special characteristics
Amendment 1: New symbol ST for syndiotactic
